heroMovies.title: Alien: Romulus
heroMovies.description: Young space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe. When a salvage crew boards an abandoned space station, they encounter a deadly alien creature that hunts them relentlessly. Their only chance of survival is to work together and find a way off the station before it's too late.

heroMovies.title: Arrival
heroMovies.description: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien lifeforms after mysterious spacecraft appear around the world. As tension rises between nations, she must unlock the secrets of the alien language to prevent global conflict. Her discoveries about the nature of language and time will change everything humanity knows about itself.

heroMovies.title: Top Gun: Maverick
heroMovies.description: After decades of service in the Navy, Maverick trains a new generation of pilots for a dangerous mission that pushes them to their limits. Maverick confronts his past when he discovers his estranged son is among the pilots he must train. Together, they must overcome their differences to complete a seemingly impossible task.

heroMovies.title: Dune: Part Two
heroMovies.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. As he embraces his role as a legendary leader, Paul must navigate the dangerous politics of the desert planet Arrakis. His rise to power comes with a terrible price that threatens to consume him.

heroMovies.title: Oppenheimer
heroMovies.description: During World War II, J. Robert Oppenheimer leads the Manhattan Project and changes history forever. Tasked with building the world's first atomic bomb, Oppenheimer faces the moral weight of his creation as it becomes a reality. His triumph becomes a burden as he grapples with the devastating consequences of his scientific achievement.

nowShowingMovies.title: Blade Runner 2049
nowShowingMovies.description: A young blade runner discovers a secret that could change the fate of humanity and seeks out Rick Deckard, a former blade runner who has been missing for thirty years. K uncovers the truth about artificial beings and what it means to be human in a dystopian future. His quest for answers leads him down a dangerous path that challenges everything he believes.

nowShowingMovies.title: Peaky Blinders
nowShowingMovies.description: A gangster family epic set in 1919 Birmingham, England, follows a gang who sew razor blades in the peaks of their caps. The Shelby family navigates the dangerous underworld of post-war Britain while building their criminal empire. Ambition, violence, and power drive these charismatic outlaws to the top.

nowShowingMovies.title: Avatar 2
nowShowingMovies.description: Jake Sully and Neytiri must protect their family and fight to stay together as trouble follows them across Pandora. Fleeing from persecution, they discover new lands and peoples on the ocean world of Pandora. They face their greatest enemies yet as they battle to protect their world and loved ones.

nowShowingMovies.title: Interstellar
nowShowingMovies.description: A team of explorers travels through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival by finding a new habitable planet. Former pilot Cooper must leave his family behind to lead the mission beyond our galaxy. Time and space become obstacles as he races against the clock to save mankind.

nowShowingMovies.title: Inception
nowShowingMovies.description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea. Cobb assembles a team to infiltrate multiple layers of dreams within dreams to achieve the impossible task of inception. As reality begins to blur, the team must question what is real and whether they can escape the dream world.

nowShowingMovies.title: The Dark Knight
nowShowingMovies.description: Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological tests to fight injustice when a mysterious criminal mastermind called the Joker wreaks havoc on Gotham City. The Dark Knight must choose between saving his loved ones and being the hero Gotham needs. As chaos spreads, Batman realizes that the Joker is not just a criminal, but a reflection of himself.

comingSoonMovies.title: F1
comingSoonMovies.description: A retired Formula 1 driver returns to the sport as a mentor to a young, ambitious driver competing in the World Championship. As tensions rise between teammates and rivals battle for dominance on the track, personal rivalries threaten to derail everything. The film captures the high-stakes drama, intense competition, and passion that define the world of elite motorsport.

comingSoonMovies.title: Minions 3
comingSoonMovies.description: The world's most lovable little yellow troublemakers are back in an all-new adventure full of chaos and laughs. Gru's mischievous minions stumble into a new plot that requires their special brand of mayhem. Together, they must save the day in the most hilarious way possible.

comingSoonMovies.title: Napoleon
comingSoonMovies.description: An epic that details the checkered rise and fall of French Emperor Napoleon Bonaparte and his relentless journey to power. From humble beginnings to commanding armies across Europe, Napoleon reshapes history through military genius and ambition. His empire crumbles as quickly as it rose, leaving a legacy that spans centuries.

comingSoonMovies.title: Gladiator II
comingSoonMovies.description: Years after witnessing the death of Maximus, Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum and must look to his past to find the strength to return glory to Rome. As a slave and gladiator, Lucius uncovers conspiracies that threaten the empire. He must become a legendary warrior to avenge his family and save Rome.

comingSoonMovies.title: Avengers Endgame
comingSoonMovies.description: After Thanos wipes out half of all life, the Avengers assemble once more to reverse the destruction and restore the universe. The team travels through time to collect the Infinity Stones and undo the catastrophe. In a final epic battle, they must sacrifice everything to save the world.

comingSoonMovies.title: Inside Out 2
comingSoonMovies.description: Riley enters her teenage years and experiences new, more complex emotions including anxiety, envy, and embarrassment. Her emotions must work together to navigate the challenges of adolescence and growing up. Joy discovers that sadness and new emotions play important roles in Riley's emotional development.

comingSoonMovies.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
comingSoonMovies.description: Deadpool and Wolverine team up in a hilarious and action-packed adventure that defies all expectations. The merc with a mouth and the adamantium claws clash before realizing they need each other to save a greater threat. Their banter and chemistry make for an unforgettable ride of laughs and brutal action.

animationMovies.title: Penguins of Madagascar
animationMovies.description: Skipper, Kowalski, Rico and Private join forces with the spy agency North Wind to stop a villainous octopus from taking over the world. The penguin squad discovers their secret spy abilities and must work with their new allies to save the day. Their hilarious antics and teamwork prove that they're more than just cute and cuddly.

animationMovies.title: Lion King
animationMovies.description: Lion prince Simba flees his kingdom after the murder of his father, only to learn the true meaning of responsibility and bravery. As an adult, Simba must face his past and confront his uncle Scar to reclaim his throne. With the help of loyal friends, Simba discovers that the circle of life connects all living things.

animationMovies.title: Brave
animationMovies.description: A Scottish princess defies ancient custom and must undo a beastly curse before it destroys her kingdom. Merida uses her archery skills and wit to change her fate and protect those she loves. In her journey, she learns that true courage comes from within and that family bonds are unbreakable.

animationMovies.title: Up
animationMovies.description: 78-year-old Carl Fredricksen ties thousands of balloons to his house and flies to South America to pursue his lifelong dream. Along the way, he befriends a young wilderness explorer named Russell, and together they discover unexpected adventure. As they journey through a fantastical world, Carl learns that life is about the relationships we build, not the destinations we reach.

animationMovies.title: Toy Story
animationMovies.description: A cowboy doll named Woody is threatened by the arrival of a new space ranger action figure named Buzz in his owner's room. The two toys get into a rivalry and accidentally end up lost in the world outside of their toy box. Together, they must navigate the dangerous world of toys and learn the true meaning of friendship.

animationMovies.title: Finding Nemo
animationMovies.description: When Nemo is captured by divers, his father Marlin embarks on an epic journey across the ocean to rescue him with the help of an amnesiac fish named Dory. Marlin discovers the courage he never knew he had as he faces countless dangers and obstacles. Their adventure teaches them about family, friendship, and the importance of never giving up.
